meta.name: RPGAdventure_SceneCrafting_v1
meta.description: Generates an RPG adventure as a series of interconnected scenes, following classic narrative stages from setup to conclusion.

inputs.name: world_concept
inputs.label: World Concept
inputs.description: A detailed description of the world, its unique rules, and primary locations where factions hold sway.

inputs.name: protagonists
inputs.label: Protagonist Details
inputs.description: A list of the main characters, including their core traits, motivations, and background.

inputs.name: inciting_incident
inputs.label: Inciting Incident
inputs.description: The specific event that kicks off the story and propels the protagonists into action.

inputs.name: overarching_goal
inputs.label: Overarching Goal
inputs.description: The primary objective the protagonists are trying to achieve throughout the adventure.

inputs.name: key_factions
inputs.label: Key Factions
inputs.description: The major groups, powers, or influential entities operating in the world.

inputs.name: central_theme
inputs.label: Central Theme
inputs.description: The core message or underlying idea of the story, e.g., 'sacrifice', 'corruption', 'hope'.

inputs.name: narrative_tone
inputs.label: Narrative Tone
inputs.description: The overall feeling and style of the adventure.

outputs.name: adventure_storyline
outputs.label: Adventure Storyline
outputs.description: The complete narrative structure of the RPG adventure, broken down by its core stages.

fields.name: prep_and_intro_scene
fields.label: Prep & Intro Scene
fields.description: The opening scene that introduces the world, characters, and the inciting incident.

fields.name: overcoming_challenge_scenes
fields.label: Overcoming Challenge Scenes
fields.description: A series of scenes where the characters face trials and obstacles.

fields.name: midpoint_twist_or_setback_scene
fields.label: Midpoint - Twist or Setback Scene
fields.description: The critical scene where a shock reveal or significant setback occurs, changing the story's direction.

fields.name: solving_puzzle_or_roleplay_challenge_scenes
fields.label: Solving Puzzles / Roleplay Challenge Scenes
fields.description: Scenes focused on intellectual, social, or personal challenges rather than pure combat.

fields.name: climax_and_confrontation_scene
fields.label: Climax & Confrontation Scene
fields.description: The final, most intense scene where characters face their ultimate test.

fields.name: resolution_and_denouement_scene
fields.label: Resolution & Denouement Scene
fields.description: The concluding scene that wraps up the story, ties up loose ends, and reflects on the journey.
